lactation-friendly-cookies.name: Lactation-friendly Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Combine water and flaxseed in a small bowl; set aside to soak, 3 to 5 minutes.

Beat coconut oil, white sugar, and brown sugar together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Beat in 1 egg until completely blended. Add remaining 1 egg, flaxseed mixture, and vanilla; beat until smooth.

Combine flour, brewer's yeast, and salt in a separate bowl; add to sugar-egg mixture and beat until just incorporated, forming a dough. Fold in oats and cocoa nibs. Roll dough into small balls; arrange on baking sheets and flatten slightly.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 10 to 12 minutes.

lamb-and-feta-frittata.name: Lamb And Feta Frittata

ingredients.item: Mild red pepper flakes and more torn herbs

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Combine garlic, za’atar, 1 Tbsp. oil, ½ tsp. lemon zest, and 1 tsp. lemon juice in a small bowl. Add lamb, season with salt, and mix well.
Gently whisk eggs and ¼ cup yogurt in a medium bowl; season with salt and black pepper. Stir in scallions, kale, cilantro, feta, basil, and tarragon.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium well-seasoned cast-iron or nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add small pinches of lamb mixture evenly across skillet and cook, undisturbed, until well browned, about 2 minutes. Toss and continue to cook, breaking up clumps with a spoon, until just cooked through, about 2 minutes more.

Pour in egg mixture and gently shake pan to distribute. Cook, pulling in edges with a rubber spatula to keep them from sticking to sides of pan and shaking pan occasionally, until edge of frittata has set evenly, about 3 minutes.
Transfer to oven and bake frittata until top is set but a small 1" circle of egg in the center still wobbles when shaken, 12–14 minutes.
Dollop with yogurt, sprinkle with red pepper, and top with lemon zest and herbs. Serve right out of skillet.

lamb-and-rice-stuffed-grape-leaves.name: Lamb And Rice Stuffed Grape Leaves
instructions: Place ground lamb, rice, 1/4 cups olive oil, mint, currants, pine nuts, salt, pepper, cumin, cinnamon, oregano, and egg in a bowl. Mix together thoroughly with a fork. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
Gently unroll and separate grape leaves. Rinse in cold water to remove brine. Drain. Reserve broken or less-than-perfect leaves to line pot.

Place grape leaves on work surface with smooth side down (ribs of leaves up). Place a rounded tablespoon of lamb-rice filling near bottom-center of grape leaf. Fold bottom sections of leaf over mixture, fold over sides, and roll toward the top of the leaf into a firm cylinder. Don't roll too tightly or leaves may burst when rice cooks.

Drizzle 1 tablespoon olive oil into pot; line bottom of pot with 1 or 2 layers of reserved grape leaves. Place dolmas in pot by arranging them along the sides, then working toward the center to cover the bottom. Leave enough space between dolmas to allow for expansion, but close enough to hold their shapes when cooking. If necessary, stack another layer on top of the first so they all fit. Pour in lemon juice and 2 teaspoons olive oil.

Invert a small plate and then a larger plate over the dolmas to weigh them down while they cook and prevent them from shifting. Pour in hot chicken broth. Bring to a simmer, uncovered, over medium-high heat. As soon as liquid is heated through and starting to bubble (2 to 4 minutes), reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and cook 35 minutes. Remove plates and check for doneness. Dolmas should look a bit puffed up, and a fork should pierce them easily. If not quite done, continue cooking without the weights: cover the pot and simmer until rice is tender, 10 to 15 minutes longer.
Serve warm or chilled. Garnish with curls of lemon zest, if desired.

lamb-ribs-with-red-sauce-argiro.name: Lamb Ribs With Red Sauce
instructions: Heat a pan and sauté for a few minutes the cumin seeds without adding a fatty substance, to remove their flavors.
Then we break them in the mortar or in the multi cutter.
Cut the onions into think slides and rub the tomatoes.
Clean the potatoes and cut them to four.
Add the rib, onions, tomatoes, paste, potatoes, cumin, salt and pepper to a Clay bowl with lid.
Mix to share the instrumentals evening and season the meat.
Pour with the olive oil, cover the vessel and make the food in a preheated evening in the air, on the medium grill, for 30 minutes.
Lower the ozone intensity to 1603
Uncover the vessel and bake for 30 more minutes, until the lamb chops melt and the sauce thinks.
Allow the food to stand for 10 minutes outside the open and then sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the tavah with drained yogurt and warm bread.

If you don’t want to use eggs 2 tablespoons of yogurt or 1 tablespoon of flax seeds (1 tablespoon of linen + 3 tablespoons of water).
Espresso, turkish coffee or flavored coffee (again, carmelli) can be used.
You can add only half a teaspoon of coffee who want a lighter taste.

leg-of-lamb-in-olive-crust-with-potatoes.name: Leg Of Lamb In Olive Crust With Potatoes
leg-of-lamb-in-olive-crust-with-potatoes.original_name: Perna de borrego em crosta de azeitonas com batatinhas
instructions: Put in the robot glass 2 cloves of unshelled garlic, the white wine, 2 rhinestones of thyme, half the sweet pepper, salt and pepper to taste and call 10 seconds at speed 6. Season the meat with this mixture, add the blond leaves and let marinate in the cold for 3 hours (or preferably overnight).
Start the oven at 200 degrees. Wash the chips, dry them, put them on a tray, salt them with salt and bake them for 30 minutes.

Lay the remaining peeled garlic, olives, breadcrumbs and 1 spoon of olive oil on the clean glass and turn 30 seconds at speed 6 (you should get a well-connected dough). If necessary, add 1 spoon of water.

Water the lamb leg with 2 tablespoons (soup) of the olive oil and bring it to the oven, preheated to 180oC, or until it is well roasted and golden. Remove, bar it with mustard and cover it with the previous mixture. Take it back to the oven until the crust is very crispy.

lemon-cookies-with-mastic-argiro.name: Lemon Cookies With Mastic
instructions: Shake the flour first with baking powder.
In the mixer's bowl, beat the butter and sugar for 4 minutes at a high speed until it becomes almost cream.
Add the eggs one at a time to the lemon cookies mixture.
Add the vanilla and some milk, lemon zest and ammonia.
Finally, add the flour and after the dough is collected in a ball, start making fuses and give whatever shape we want to cookies. We usually braid them.
Add them to sheet with parchment paper.
Add the ingredients for the egg solution into a bowl and mix with a fork.
Brush the cookies twice with the egg solution.
Bake in a well-heated evening at 160-1970°C in the air for about 25 minutes to brown.

lemon-honey-tart-with-salted-shortbread-.name: Lemon-honey Tart With Salted Shortbread Crust

ingredients.item: Meyer lemon or thin-skinned regular lemon

instructions: Coat springform pan with nonstick spray. Whisk flour, cornstarch, and salt in a small bowl; set aside. Place butter and powdered sugar in a food processor. Pulse until mixture is smooth. Add dry ingredients to food processor and pulse until mixture resembles medium-size pebbles (dough will not come together completely). Transfer dough to prepared pan. Using your fingers, press dough evenly onto bottom and 1 1/2 inches up sides of pan.
DO AHEAD: Crust can be prepared 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Using a mandoline, slice lemon into paper-thin rounds. Remove seeds. (If using a regular lemon, blanch slices in boiling water for 4 minutes, drain, and let cool before proceeding). Mix sugar, honey, and lemon zest in a medium bowl. Add lemon slices and toss to coat. Let sit until lemon is softened and sugar is dissolved, 30-45 minutes.
DO AHEAD: Lemon slice mixture can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Place rack in upper third of oven; preheat to 325°. Bake crust until center is firm to the touch and edges are beginning to turn golden brown, 30-35 minutes.

When crust is almost done baking, whisk eggs and egg yolks in a medium bowl to blend. Whisk flour, cornstarch, and salt in a small bowl; add to egg mixture and whisk to combine. Whisk in lemon juice. Add lemon slice mixture; mix gently to combine.

Reduce oven temperature to 300°. Pour filling into hot crust. Bake until filling is set and slightly puffed around edges, 25-30 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack; let cool completely. Chill for at least 4 hours, then unmold. Serve cold.
DO AHEAD: Tart can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

lemonade-chicken-casserole-with-rice-arg.name: Lemonade Chicken Casserole With Rice
instructions: We will dry the chicken very well first on absorbent paper.
Heat the olive oil and brown the chicken for a few minutes on all sides.
Add all the vegetables whole, rub some nutmeg.
Add the wine and allow it to evaporate by half.
Fill in hot water or homemade chicken broth until the chicken is half covered.
Cover the pot and bottle over medium heat for about 30′ until soft.
Add salt and pepper at the end of the boil. Remove all vegetables from the pot.
We keep 2 cup of chicken broth aside for rice.
Dissolve the corn flour with lemon and add it to the sauce.
Boil on low heat until the sauce thickens slightly.
See here all the secrets to properly tie your sauces.

lemongrass-seafood-stew.name: Lemongrass-seafood Stew

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: seeds removed if desired, finely chopped

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Using the back of a knife, lightly smash lemongrass, then thinly slice. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high heat. Add carrots and fennel, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring often, until softened, 6–8 minutes. Add onion and jalapeño and cook, stirring often, until softened, 5–7 minutes. Add garlic, lemongrass, lemon zest, bay leaf, and ginger and cook, stirring often, until fragrant, 5–7 minutes.

Add wine, scraping up any brown bits from bottom of pot, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until almost completely reduced, about 2 minutes. Mix in lemon juice, tomato paste, sugar, and pink peppercorns. Add tomatoes, breaking up with your hands; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer 5 minutes (you want to infuse tomatoes while keeping them fresh-tasting). Let cool slightly.
Working in batches, blend broth to a coarse purée; strain through fine-mesh sieve and discard solids. Return broth to pot.

Preheat oven to 425°. Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook, swirling, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Brush cut sides of baguette with garlic butter. Bake, cut side up, on a rimmed baking sheet until golden brown, 5–7 minutes; sprinkle with chives and parsley and season with salt and pepper.

Bring broth to a boil; reduce heat and add mussels and clams. Cover pot and simmer until clams and mussels are open, transferring to a large bowl with a slotted spoon as they open (discard any that do not open), 10–15 minutes.

Add prawns and squid to broth, cover, and simmer until cooked through, about 3 minutes for squid and about 5 minutes for prawns. Transfer squid to bowl with clams and mussels with a slotted spoon as they finish cooking. Return squid, clams, and mussels to pot as soon as prawns are done.
Meanwhile, combine fennel, shallots, cilantro, and lettuces in a medium bowl. Drizzle with lemon juice and oil and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.
Divide stew among bowls and top with salad. Serve with garlic bread alongside.

lemony-goat-with-potatoes-in-the-shell-a.name: Lemony Goat With Potatoes In The Shell
lemony-goat-with-potatoes-in-the-shell-a.original_name: Κατσικάκι λεμονάτο με πατάτες στη γάστρα

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg goat split leg or hand
11⁄2 kg goat split leg or hand

instructions: For the lemony goat in the pot, heat the ocean to 200°C in resistance.
We can put the whole piece or cut the goat into rations.
In a bowl, mix the olive oil, lemon, juice and zest the oregano, mustard, salt and pepper.
Beat them with wire, make them look like cream.
Clean, wash and cut the potatoes.
Add them into the bowl with the liquid ingredients and mix well.
Pour the potatoes into a large or deep pan.
Add the garlic cloves with the peel and the thyme branches and rosemary.
We cut into the goat’s spade and we enter with the ringers a lot of salt and pepper.
Place the meat on the potato layer.
Pour with the mixture that has spread the potatoes.
Finally, add the water to the hull or baking pan.
Cover the hull with the lid or if you use a baking pan, cover with parchment paper and foil, closing around the baking pan to seal well.
Bake for 1 hour at 200
Uncover the Hull or baking pan, lower the evening to 1803
In the end he has to stay with his oil.

lime-pickleroasted-chicken-with-potatoes.name: Lime Pickle–roasted Chicken With Potatoes And Watercress
instructions: Pulse garlic, ginger, lime pickle, paprika, cayenne, and one-quarter of onions in a food processor until smooth. Add mayonnaise, season with black pepper, and pulse to combine. Scrape marinade into a large resealable plastic bag.

Pat chicken dry; season lightly with salt (the lime pickle is already pretty salty, so use a light hand). Add to bag with marinade, seal bag, and toss chicken to coat. Let sit at room temperature 1 hour or chill up to 12 hours. (The longer the chicken marinates, the more the lime flavor will come through.) Wrap up remaining onion; chill until ready to use.
If chilling chicken, let sit at room temperature 1 hour before roasting.

Preheat oven to 450°. Toss potatoes and remaining sliced onions with oil in a large roasting pan. Add ¼ cup water; season with salt and toss again. Place chicken, skin side up, on top (make sure the pieces have some space between them). Roast until chicken thighs are lightly charred in spots and cooked through, 45–55 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit 10 minutes.
Toss watercress with lemon juice in a small bowl; season with salt.
Serve roasted chicken and potatoes and onions with watercress.

lisas-tomatillo-and-strawberry-pie.name: Lisa's Tomatillo And Strawberry Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Press 1 pie crust into a 9-inch pie dish.

Stir tomatillos, strawberries, tapioca, sugar, and lemon juice together in a bowl; let stand, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved, about 15 minutes. Spoon tomatillo-strawberry mixture into the prepared pie crust. Scatter butter slices over filling.
Cover pie with second pie crust and pinch edges together to seal. Cut slits into top crust for ventilation. Place pie on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until top crust is golden brown and filling is bubbling, about 50 minutes.

loin-with-orange-and-delicious-recipe-pe.name: Loin With Orange: , And Delicious Recipe
loin-with-orange-and-delicious-recipe-pe.original_name: Lomo a la naranja: receta fácil, rápida y deliciosa
instructions: Limpiamos el lomo de cerdo y le quitamos la grasa superficial.
Salpimentamos bien por todas partes.
In the same expressed pot we cover the bottom with olive oil and as hot we put the whole back.
We sealed up till the meat was golden throughout, including the ends. That way we'll stop them from losing their juices and seizing during cooking.
Una vez sellado el lomo, lo retiramos y reservamos en un plato.
We cut the onion into strips and cut the garlic in half and make sure that first we remove the central outbreak to avoid its inditent.
We salted slightly and we leapt into the same meat oil till clear. We can add the rosemary and thyme now or at the time of incorporation.
We add the white wine and we heat up till the alcohol evaporate. We have used manzanilla wine but you can use another type of white wine.
Once the alcohol evaporate we add the orange juice and the two tablespoons of honey.
We put in that piece of pork back we had booked. If you have released juices in the plate we add them to the pot as well.
We close the express pot and cook in place 2 for 30 minutes counting from the start of steam.
Once steam starts to come out, you can put the fire down to the point where it keeps coming out constantly, but you don't have to have the fire at best.
Pasado el tiempo dejamos salir el vapor y abrimos la olla.
Sacamos la carne y cuando se temple la cortamos en filetes.
We put out the herbs and shredded the salsa with an electrical mixer.
Ponemos a fuego lento para que reduzca un poco.
We serve hot with pork steaks with an already crushed orange sauce.

low-carb-pizza-teleculinaria.name: Low-carb Pizza
instructions: Start the oven at 200 degrees. Set a tray with 1 spoon (soup) of the olive oil and book.
Coloque as farinhas e o fermento numa tigela e tempere com sal e pimenta a gosto. Adicione 2 colheres (sopa) do restante azeite, o ovo e as claras e envolva.
Extend the mass in circular format and place it on the board. Bar it with tomato pulp, leaving a maple all around, and season it with salt, pepper and some chopped basil leaves.
Cut the cheese into slices and dispose of them over the sauce. Water with the rest of the olive oil and put it in the oven for 10 minutes. Remove, decorate with basil leaves and serve.
